Model: Linear
mu_chieff(q) = (x3 / abs((x1 / (5.916832181142075 - ((x1 + 0.6212334084993646) ^ square(-1.627678138973801 / x1)))) + 5.963231193372858)) + 0.0034707292175851522
log sigma_chieff(q) = (((-0.07220826388715455 - (x5 * 0.19578718001990073)) * (x3 + ((x4 * x8) ^ 1.025785878707669))) - (x3 * -2.0468625617500478)) + -2.909162435826012
